selectionRule.population: all 365 daily hourly-prediction rows in calendar year 2026
selectionRule.dailyRangeDefinition: maximum hourly height minus minimum hourly height
selectionRule.representativeRule: choose the earliest day whose daily range is closest to the annual median daily range

candidateCurve.simulationUseIfApproved: relative anomaly multiplied by each case amplitudeMultiplier and shifted by phaseShiftMinutes

otherBoundaryRule.N: constant inferred discharge sampled from the approved case range; Gion Bridge remains provenance candidate only
otherBoundaryRule.O: constant inferred discharge sampled from the approved case range; Nakama and Karakuma remain provenance candidates only
otherBoundaryRule.G: constant inferred discharge sampled from the approved case range and labelled inference-only

visualDecision.question: May the 2026-02-15 mean-removed Hakata astronomical tide curve be used as the relative M-boundary reference for solver integration?
doesApprove: the 24-hour mean-removed curve and next-day interpolation point
use of the approved phase and amplitude multiplier ranges
constant inferred N, O, and G discharges during each 500-step case
